local_results.title: Haywire
local_results.description: 3-story spot for Texas cuisine & whiskey. Each level has unique offerings with a 1st floor whiskey bar, 2nd floor dining room & rooftop patio.
local_results.user_review: "Great food, greater drinks, top-notch service, astounding atmosphere!"

local_results.title: Kanny's Restaurant and Lounge
local_results.description: Family-owned restaurant in the Walnut Street Mall serving traditional Nigerian cuisine and cocktails amid a cozy atmosphere.
local_results.user_review: "Just had a meal here food, atmosphere, was great service was amazing."

local_results.title: Luke's
local_results.open_state: Closes soon · 2 PM · Opens 8 AM Sun
local_results.hours: Closes soon · 2 PM · Opens 8 AM Sun
local_results.description: Relaxed eatery for Southern-inspired staples including biscuits, grits, pancakes and pies.
local_results.user_review: "Great service, yummy food, atmosphere was beautiful and inviting!"

local_results.title: Texas Cafe Diner Greenville
local_results.description: Casual, no-frills diner with a Texas-inspired menu of pancakes, omelets and chicken dishes.
local_results.user_review: "The food was delicious and the atmosphere was very welcoming."

local_results.title: Bavarian Grill
local_results.description: Lively German beer garden/restaurant. A costumed staff, polka band & big beer selection fuel the festive mood at this German eatery.
local_results.user_review: "The server was very helpful and gave wonderful beer and food recommendation."

local_results.title: Windmills Craftworks [Grandscape]
local_results.description: Sleek brewpub with global eats & music. Streamlined microbrewery & international eatery featuring regular live music & patio seating.
local_results.user_review: "The menu is innovative and the items we ordered were delicious."

local_results.title: Sister Restaurant
local_results.description: Cozy, elegantly decorated restaurant offering Italian fare with a Mediterranean twist, plus wine and cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "Everything was exceptional from the service, the drinks, to the food."

local_results.title: Nina's Brunch
local_results.description: Modern diner for daytime favorites. Contemporary eatery with booth seats dishing up breakfast & lunch classics, along with mimosas.
local_results.user_review: "Our server Star was very attentive and friendly and the food was delicious."

local_results.title: Wings Over USA - Fate
local_results.user_review: "Spacious booths, good food and Kymiah provided great service!"

local_results.title: Quartino Ristorante
local_results.address: 5754 Grandscape Blvd Ste 200, The Colony, TX 75056
local_results.description: Italian eatery featuring thin-crust pizzas and pastas as well as a wine list and happy hour.
local_results.user_review: "The food, ambience, service, and aesthetics were all on point."

local_results.title: SI Señor Tex-Mex Restaurant
local_results.description: Relaxed Tex-Mex eatery featuring familiar brunch and dinner staples such as fajitas, tacos and enchiladas.
local_results.user_review: "Wonderful service, ambiance, and delicious food that came out hot and fast."

local_results.title: La Hacienda Ranch
local_results.description: Tex-Mex dining & frozen margaritas. Longtime cantina favored for homestyle Mexican fare & margaritas in bright, festive surroundings.
local_results.user_review: "Service was great, our drinks never ran dry, and food was fantastic."

local_results.title: Old Damascus Mediterranean Restaurant
local_results.description: Authentic eatery for Middle Eastern classics such as shawarma, kabsa and hummus, plus tea.
local_results.user_review: "The vibe was intimate and cozy and the food was delicious."

local_results.title: Lazy Dog Restaurant & Bar
local_results.description: Casual spot for global comfort eats. Relaxed, lodge-chic chain serving global comfort fare, including stir-fries, pot roast & pastas.
local_results.user_review: "Absolutely divine, hand crafted food, beautiful drinks with amazing flavor."

local_results.title: Bucky's Cafe
local_results.description: Home-cooked comfort food joint. Homestyle local diner serving scratch-made comfort eats, from waffles to burgers in casual digs.
local_results.user_review: "Service was still great, the food was wonderful,  and the atmosphere good."

local_results.title: Umi Umi
local_results.description: Relaxed spot for a range of rolls along with ramen, bento boxes and poke.
local_results.user_review: "The food comes out in very gorgeous plating and as delicious as it looks!"

local_results.title: Onassis Greek Taphouse + Kitchen
local_results.address: 760 W Ralph Hall Pkwy #120, Rockwall, TX 75032
local_results.description: Brand-new restaurant offering a variety of Greek comfort food, plus beer, wine, and cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "Our food was incredible and our waitress, Emma, gave amazing service."

local_results.title: Tayta Peruvian Restaurant
local_results.user_review: "Every dish is packed with incredible flavor and plated beautifully."

local_results.title: Cattlemans Cafe
local_results.address: 120 W James St, Blue Ridge, TX 75424
local_results.description: Down-to-earth restaurant serving steak, pies and burgers, along with breakfast options and lunch items.
local_results.user_review: "The steak was cooked perfectly and seasoned just right."

local_results.title: Ferah Tex-Med Kitchen
local_results.description: Texas spin on Mediterranean cuisine. Friendly spot for Texas spin on Mediterranean favorites, including gyro quesadillas & falafel tacos.
local_results.user_review: "The food, atmosphere, service and drinks are always consistent and amazing!"

local_results.title: Good Chef Restaurant
local_results.description: Restaurant serving up Asian mains and bubble teas in a casual setting with a rooftop.
local_results.user_review: "The service was amazing, loved the vibe, and the food was delicious!"

local_results.title: Korner67
local_results.description: Global-cuisine restaurant featuring a menu of steaks, seafood, sushi and tapas.
local_results.user_review: "The food drinks atmosphere and service were all impeccable!"

local_results.title: The Knife Parrilla Argentina - Doral - Argentinian Steakhouse
local_results.description: All-you-can-eat Argentinean chophouse. Low-key choice for a buffet of Argentinean-style grilled meats & salads at Miami International Mall.
local_results.user_review: "Service was excellent the ambiance was great and the food was phenomenal."

local_results.title: CVI.CHE 105
local_results.description: Hip, open eatery with Peruvian cuisine. Bright, airy, industrial venue featuring ceviche & traditional Peruvian fare, plus cocktails & wine.
local_results.user_review: "Our server Leidy was attentive and her recommendations were delicious."

local_results.title: Bocas House
local_results.description: Family-friendly hub for Peruvian cuisine. Lively Peruvian joint dispensing classic eats like ceviche and grilled steak, plus creative desserts.
local_results.user_review: "Unique atmosphere, amazing presentation of food, apps, and drinks."

local_results.title: Miami to Brazil Rodizio
local_results.user_review: "Service was great, food was delicious and the vibe was nice."

local_results.title: Francisca Charcoal Chicken & Meats | Doral
local_results.description: Casual eatery with Latin American fare. Hearty Latin American cooking served in a laid-back restaurant specializing in BBQ chicken.
local_results.user_review: "Delicious food, drinks were amazing and service from Yadira was incredible."

local_results.title: Good Chef Restaurant
local_results.description: Easygoing spot for Asian comfort food. Casual eatery offering a familiar selection of homestyle Asian dishes & desserts, plus bubble tea.
local_results.user_review: "Amazing service, stellar food,  awesome drinks, superb atmosphere."

local_results.title: Moo! Arte en Carnes
local_results.description: Relaxed eatery serving steak cuts and other Argentine specialties along with wines from the region and cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "Service was top notch, the vibe was great, and our meal was excellent."

local_results.title: Le Patio - The tiniest cutest Restaurant in South Florida
local_results.description: Romantic French dining in a petite nook. Pint-sized bistro with an intimate, quirky patio serves French comfort food, plus many wines.

parking: Usually somewhat difficult to find a space

local_results.user_review: "Fantastic food and romantic patio setting - a delightful experience!"

local_results.title: Craft American Eatery
local_results.address: at CandleWood Suites Hotel, 5911 NW 36th St, Miami, FL 33166
local_results.description: Warm restaurant serving burgers, steaks, salads and cocktails.
local_results.user_review: "The food was impeccably fresh and delicious and the service was stellar."

local_results.title: Luka Restaurant and Coffee
local_results.description: Comfy, homey eatery featuring Latin American specialties and coffee (with baristas) prepared from scratch by friendly staff.
local_results.user_review: "Food Was Amazing 😋 Inside was packed we sat outside & it was perfect."

local_results.title: City Food Hall Doral (formerly Shoma Bazaar)
local_results.description: Visually stunning food hall with 6 zones ranging from Americana to Asian-raw, plus a biergarten.
local_results.user_review: "The ambiance was great  the staff was friendly and the food was amazing!"

local_results.title: Sancho Restaurant
local_results.description: Casual Spanish restaurant known for whole roast suckling pig and other classic dishes, plus live entertainment.
local_results.user_review: "The food was exquisite, and the atmosphere was flawless."

local_results.title: El Toro Loco Steakhouse Tamiami
local_results.description: Casual venue for Brazilian grilled meats. Upbeat restaurant offering hearty plates of Brazilian grilled meats, tacos & other traditional eats.
local_results.user_review: "The food and drinks were all delicious, and our server Kathy was excellent!"

local_results.title: Casa Mariano
local_results.description: Upscale restaurant with an eclectic menu and a wine list, serving seafood and other gourmet fare in an inviting atmosphere.
local_results.user_review: "Great vibe, excellent and knowledgeable servers, DELICIOUS food!"

local_results.title: The Fatty Crab
local_results.description: New Orleans-style restaurant with a seafood-boil focus.
local_results.user_review: "The food has been delicious, service good, and the atmosphere is great."

local_results.title: Pisco Y Nazca Ceviche Gastrobar
local_results.description: Peruvian fare in handsome environs. Chic spot with a South American feel serving modern Peruvian fare, cocktails & beer.
local_results.user_review: "Delicious food and drinks, wonderful service, atmosphere is very relaxing."

local_results.title: Finka Table & Tap
local_results.description: Cuban gastropub with hacienda-ish decor. Gastropub with a homey, hacienda feel serving unique Cuban fare with Peruvian and Korean influences.
local_results.user_review: "The vibe, the food, the service, and the drinks were all outstanding!"

local_results.title: KOW Restaurant
local_results.description: Cozy eatery also serving steaks and seafood alongside a mix of international plates.
local_results.user_review: "Loved the food, service was amazing, and the atmosphere was very urban."

local_results.title: Copper Door
local_results.description: Lofty, warm space for seasonal cuisine. Seasonal & local fare join a deep wine menu in this airy, elegant space with cathedral ceilings.
local_results.user_review: "My husband said the pork belly tacos were the best he had ever had."

local_results.title: Revival Kitchen and Bar
local_results.description: Classic bistro fare in a rustic setting. Modern Italian & internationally influenced menu featuring local ingredients & a list of whiskies.
local_results.user_review: "Staff is great, Chef's food is incredible and farm to table."

local_results.title: Granite Restaurant & Bar
local_results.description: Chic New American dining at a hotel. High-end, seasonal New American cuisine & global wines in swanky quarters at The Centennial Hotel.
local_results.user_review: "The food was delicious, drinks were great and service was exceptional."

local_results.description: American fare in a kid-friendly space. Family-friendly restaurant serving up a huge American menu, including many kids' options.
local_results.user_review: "The food was delicious, the atmosphere and aesthetic were incredible."

local_results.title: Cotton Restaurant
local_results.description: Hip, acclaimed New American kitchen. Popular destination for modern American fare & creative drinks in trendy digs with an upscale feel.
local_results.user_review: "The food, drinks, dessert and waitstaff were all amazing."

local_results.title: Alexandra's Bistro
local_results.description: Family-run eatery featuring an American menu, beer, wine, and burgers, plus a pasta bar.
local_results.user_review: "Cocktails were well made, staff was friendly, and the food was great."

local_results.title: The Barley House Restaurant & Tavern
local_results.description: Gastropub fare, craft beer & buzzy digs. Convivial choice for elevated pub grub, craft beers & a large Irish whiskey selection.

local_results.title: Campo Enoteca

local_results.title: Red Blazer Restaurant & Pub

local_results.user_review: "Excellent food, service and atmosphere, even as busy as they were."

local_results.title: Tucker's
local_results.description: Popular breakfast spot featuring an expansive, veggie-friendly menu, plus gluten-free options.
local_results.user_review: "Terrific staff, very creative menu with many locally sourced products."
